settings.heading: Yemeni Corner starts with welcome
settings.text:
Before Yemeni Corner is an online shop, it is a coffee house: a place for traditional drinks, family flavors, late conversations, and the kind of warmth that makes a cup feel generous.

The website should do the same thing the cafe does in person. It should slow the shopper down, tell them why the coffee matters, and give them a clear way to experience it at home or in one of our local cafes.

settings.heading: A heritage deeper than a flavor note
settings.text: Yemeni coffee history gives the brand real gravity. This section teaches that history while keeping the Harraz Signature Roast claims honest and specific.
settings.note: Use this page for public coffee education. Add farm, process, altitude, harvest, importer, or roast-date claims only after they are verified.

settings.title: Yemen helped shape coffee drinking
settings.text: Coffee's plant history is tied to Ethiopia, but Yemen is central to the story of coffee cultivation, preparation, trade, and the social culture around the cup.

settings.title: The original coffee port
settings.text: Mocha, on Yemen's Red Sea coast, became famous as a coffee-exporting center. Its name traveled so far that it still lives in coffee language today.

settings.title: A mountain name with meaning
settings.text: Haraz is known in specialty coffee for Yemeni mountain coffee and terraced landscapes. For Yemeni Corner, the name points to heritage, depth, and a warm cup profile.

settings.heading: The menu carries the memory
settings.text:
Adeni tea, Mufawar coffee, Sana'ani coffee, Qishr, pistachio lattes, date lattes, and cold refreshers are not just a list of drinks. They are the way Yemeni Corner introduces people to spice, sweetness, texture, and hospitality.

The cafe remains the fullest expression of the brand. The online roast gives guests one focused way to take that feeling home.

settings.heading: One roast, chosen with intention
settings.text:
The online shop stays intentionally simple. Instead of asking guests to sort through a long catalog, Yemeni Corner leads with one whole bean coffee: a 340 g Harraz Signature Roast with warm spice, cocoa, and dried fruit notes.

It is built for people who want a dependable home brew with a stronger story behind it.

settings.heading: Yemeni Corner Harraz Signature Roast
settings.text: Brew the cafe ritual at home with our flagship medium roast whole bean coffee, built around warm spice, cocoa, and dried fruit notes.

settings.heading: Come experience the story in person
settings.text: The full Yemeni Corner experience lives in the cafes: traditional drinks, signature lattes, cold favorites, desserts, and welcoming local spaces.
